titleStmt.title: SII 22.396: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 396. (A.R. No. 396 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. SATYAGIRINĀTHA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. JAṬ. TRIBH. PARĀKRAMA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA 5+7th YEAR

summary.p: This registers the alienation in favour of his son Śīrāḷadēvaṉ of the kāṇiyāṭchi rights with all their appurtenances on a certain specified tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam (and other ?) lands at Mēlśārkuḷam, Dēvimaṅgalam and Mēlūr, and two houses in the latter two places, together with a number of slaves, by Śīrāḷadēvan Muṉaiyadaraiyaṉ Makkaṇāyaṉ of Mēlūr in Kāṉa-nāḍu. As this person who now makes a gift to his son, of some of his possessions, has figured in No. 395 above, which is of the same date as the present inscription, it is to be understood that his contemplated marriage referred to in that record was a later and second one.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrī . koccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tri[bhuva]ṉa cakravattikaḷ śrīparākkiṟamapāṇṭiyatevaṟku Āṇṭu 5- Ā
vatu Etir[ 7vatu] kumba nāyaṟṟu Aparapa[kṣattu] dvādeśiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭat
tunāḷ kāṉaṉāṭāṉa virutarācapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu melūr cirāḷatevaṉ muṉaiyataraiyaṉ makkaṇāyaṉe
ṉ Eṉ makaṉ cirāḷatevarkku nāṉ kuṭutta kāṇiyāṭciyum maṉaiyum Aṭimaiyum pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta
paricāvatu Ivarkku nāṉ kuṭutta kāṇiyāṭciyāvatu melcārkuḷattil Aṉaittum ppāl nirpā
yntu viḷaiyum paṟṟil Eṅkaḷ pitākkaḷ muṉaiyataraiyar Uṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku kuṭuttakāṇiyāṭciyum taṭa
ppaṟṟāk Inta Uṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku tēvi maṅkaḷattil vayalil cirāḷatevar pa
ṟṟiṉa melūr vayalil ciyaṉaṅkaṉ vayakkal nāṉkellaiyilumakappaṭṭa Uḻaṟṟu nilamum Innilaṅ
kaḷumaṟṟu kuṟutilaṅkaḷum kāṇiyāṭci viḻukkāṭṭil kuṭutta Uḷḷūr nāyaṉār tevatāṉam periya tevatāṉam cu
ṟṟu muṟṟu nilamum nāyaṉār tirumeyya malaiyāḷaṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa māka tevimaṅkalattu
kāṇiyil kuṭutta paṉṉiraṭikkolāl muṉṟu tarattārum
ṭi māṟṟukku viṭṭa nilam muṉṟu mā nikki nilam patiṉeḻu māvum Ā nila
māṉa viḻukkāṭu maṉaiyiṟkuṭutta melūr naṭuvil teruvil teṉ ciṟakil nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa maṉaiyum puḻakkaṭai
yum tevi maṅkalattil Eṉ viḻukkāṭu maṉaiyil kuṭutta maṉai Oṉṟum puḻakkaṭaiyum Āka Inta kāṇiyāṭciyum maṉaiyum Ivai
yiṟṟil mel nokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum puṉceyum nattamum nattappāḻum Innilaṅkaḷukku
rittāṉa kuḷaṅkaḷil nirum pāriyu maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa ttikaḷum paṟṟi Aṉupavittupotuvārākavum
Inta melūr tevimaṅkalattil nāṉ Eḻutikkuṭutta kāṇiyāṭciyum maṉaiyilum Uyarppaṉa Uyaṟṟiyum
Uḻuppaṉa Uḻuttum vaippaṉa vaittum Innilaṅkaḷil kaṭamaippaṟṟāṉa nilattukku Ūriñca mariyāti kaṭamaiyiṟuttum pa
la tevatāṉam tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭappaṟṟukku Iṟuppaṉa Iṟuttum peṟuvaṉa peṟṟum Aṉupavittu potuvārākavum
Ivaiyum Immariyāti Aṉupavittu nām Eḻutikkuṭutta Aṭimaiyāṉ teviyum Ivaḷ makaḷ cirāḷum Ivaḷ tampi makkaṇāyaṉu
m Ivaṉuṭaiya ciṟiyatāy Āvuṭaiyāḷum Ivaḷ tampi cirāḷatevanum Ivaṉ marumakaḷ cirāḷum periyaṉācci makaṉ tirumeyyama
laiyāḷaṉum ciṟutta makkaṇāyaṉum Akapporaṭṭum māṭaiyāril vaḷatta makaḷ maṟaiyum Ivaḷ makaḷ poṉṉiyum co
ḷi makaḷ toḻutiyum Uṭappi makaṉ poṉṉaṉum vaḷatti makaṉ villiyum Āka Ivvaraippaṭi Uḷḷa Aṭimaiyum kāṇiyāṭci
yu maṉaiyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa camattappraāttikaḷum tāṉātamṉa vikrakaṅkaḷukkurittāka cantraātitavaṟ cella Aṉupavikku
mpaṭik kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkuṭutteṉ cirāḷatevarkku muṉaiya taraiyaṉ makkaṇāyaṉāneṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai
melūr cirāḷatevaṉ muṉaiyataraiyaṉ makkaṇāyaṉār Eḻuttu Ivai muṉaiya taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai poṉṉaṉāyanā
rāṉa vallanāṭṭuveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku koṭṭaiyūr Ulakaḷanta coḻak kāṉaṉāṭṭuveḷār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭuveḷār Eḻuttu Ivai vāṇātarāyar Eḻuttu Ivai kaṇṇavirar cuntara mayakkāliṅkarāyar E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku terikkāṭṭur vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampala mu
ṭaiyār Āṉaiyār Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ colla Inta pramāṇam Eḻutineṉ melūr Ūrkkaṇakku Ulakala
ṅkāra muventiraveḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.396 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
